description:
Once many code repos share one balls/tasks, a task needs to record which repo it belongs to. Add a repo field to Task, populated at create time from the code repo identity (remote URL or root basename), surfaced in bl list/show. It MUST ride the forward-compat #[serde(flatten)] extra catch-all (SPEC-lifecycle S13 / bl-d31c) so an older bl round-trips it unchanged rather than dropping it on every save: the same constraint that protects any participant-emitted field.

WHY: this is the one genuinely new bit of durable task state the multi-repo model introduces; gate it behind the existing forward-compat seam so mixed-version clients on a shared hub do not silently strip provenance. Filed as a child, not a blocker: state_remote works without it; provenance just makes a shared hub legible.
title: Task repo provenance field via the forward-compat extra map
